technique_summary: This video contains educational presentation slides about SAGES fellowship programs and requirements, not an FLS task performance that can be scored using the official FLS rubric.
improvement_suggestions: To receive FLS scoring, submit video showing performance of one of the five standardized FLS tasks (peg transfer, pattern cut, endoloop, extracorporeal suture, or intracorporeal suture) in a laparoscopic trainer
